channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Despite loss, Sharks rookie forward gives parents an unforgettable gift
item.description: Recalled from AHL on Monday, San Jose Sharks winger Collin Graf scores first NHL goal against the Montreal Canadiens
item.dc:creator: Curtis Pashelka, The Mercury News

item.title: Joel Embiid has triple-double in 1st game in a month as Sixers slip past Mavs 118-116
item.description: PHILADELPHIA (AP) — Joel Embiid had 29 points, 11 rebounds and 10 assists in his first action in a month to lead the Philadelphia 76ers to a 118-116 victory Tuesday night over the Dallas Mavericks, who fell to 0-2 since trading star Luka Doncic to the Los Angeles Lakers.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Bay FC begins second season with new players, renewed energy after finishing first year with playoff appearance
item.description: Bay FC is no longer a brand-new team, as the second-year club began its 2025 season kickoff on Tuesday in San Jose
item.dc:creator: Christian Babcock, The Mercury News

item.title: Luka Doncic is excited to join the Lakers after the shock of his stunning trade away from Dallas
item.description: EL SEGUNDO, Calif. (AP) — Luka Doncic was nearly asleep last Saturday night in Dallas when his phone buzzed. Only then did he learn that the Mavericks had just stunned the sports world by trading him to the Los Angeles Lakers. “You can imagine how surprised I was,” Doncic said.
item.dc:creator: GREG BEACHAM, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Celtics rally from 26-point deficit to top 76ers 118-110
item.description: Jayson Tatum scored 13 of his 35 points in the fourth quarter and the Boston Celtics rallied from a 26-point deficit to beat the Philadelphia 76ers 118-110 on Sunday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Utah HC loses again in overtime, 3-2
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - It was yet another heartbreaking overtime loss for the Utah Hockey Club. Zach Werenski scored 61 seconds into overtime, and the Columbus Blue Jackets defeated the Utah Hockey Club 3-2 at Delta Center on Friday.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: NFL kicker Justin Tucker accused of sexual misconduct by 6 masseuses: report
item.description: Justin Tucker, kicker for the Baltimore Ravens, has been accused by six massage therapists at four separate businesses of sexually inappropriate behavior, the Baltimore Banner reported Thursday.
item.dc:creator: Alix Martichoux, KTLA 5

item.title: Aggies avenge loss to UNLV, 76-71
item.description: LOGAN, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - Five Aggies scored in double figures, as Utah State avenged its only Mountain West Conference loss of the season against UNLV Wednesday night, 76-71.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Crosby's overtime goal beats Utah HC, 3-2
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (AP) - Sidney Crosby scored with 1:06 left in overtime as the Pittsburgh Penguins beat the Utah Hockey Club 3-2 at Delta Center on Wednesday. It was Crosby's 95th career game-winning goal, moving him past Steve Yzerman for the 13th most in NHL history.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Girls Basketball: Westview 54, Mission Hills 53
item.description: SAN DIEGO (KUSI)- Girls hoops in San Marcos on Tuesday night with the Grizzlies hosting Westview. Wolverines win a nail biter 54-53.
item.dc:creator: Nick James, Fox 5
